form.formComment: Last start finished 4th over 272m at The Gardens beaten 3.5 lengths (15.98) behind Fireball Night in a Grade 3/4 on April 4. Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 4th over 272m at The Gardens beaten 3.5 lengths (15.98) behind Fireball Night in a Grade 3/4 on April 4. Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

form.formComment: Strong performance tracking the speed and going on to score by 4 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, recording an enormous 17.17 over the 300m journey. Hard to top on that run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance tracking the speed and going on to score by 4 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, recording an enormous 17.17 over the 300m journey. Hard to top on that run.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (17.59) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 3.5 lengths fourth. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (17.59) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 3.5 lengths fourth. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

form.formComment: Placed last time (18.11) at this track in a Mix 2/3, finishing third and beaten 13 lengths. Goes well out of this box with a win and seven minors. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Placed last time (18.11) at this track in a Mix 2/3, finishing third and beaten 13 lengths. Goes well out of this box with a win and seven minors. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Exiting the back straight, came together and fell shortly after.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when third (17.69) over 300m at this track. Drawn awkwardly. Looks to have the job ahead.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort last time when third (17.69) over 300m at this track. Drawn awkwardly. Looks to have the job ahead.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened between runners rounding the turn into the front straight.

form.formComment: Last start finished eighth on March 11 over 300m at this track behind Okey, beaten 15 lengths (18.53) in a Mix 1/2/3. Looks tested in this company.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished eighth on March 11 over 300m at this track behind Okey, beaten 15 lengths (18.53) in a Mix 1/2/3. Looks tested in this company.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced to give ground rounding the turnout of back straight.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when second (17.97) over 300m at this track. Wide draw here. Top-three aspirations.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort last time when second (17.97) over 300m at this track. Wide draw here. Top-three aspirations.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (17.94) in a Mix 2/3, finishing a 10 length second. Has two wins and four placings from 11 starts from the draw. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In the money last time at this track (17.94) in a Mix 2/3, finishing a 10 length second. Has two wins and four placings from 11 starts from the draw. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Last start finished sixth in a Grade 5 on April 8 over 300m at this track behind Golden Sunset, beaten 9 lengths (17.84). Prefer to watch at this stage.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished sixth in a Grade 5 on April 8 over 300m at this track behind Golden Sunset, beaten 9 lengths (17.84). Prefer to watch at this stage.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was hampered and carried wider rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in her races. The latest effort was a 23 length seventh over 300m at this track. Prepared to overlook.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in her races. The latest effort was a 23 length seventh over 300m at this track. Prepared to overlook.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came up with the lids; Start was affected and lost ground.
